characters.appearance: Young adult, slim build, fair complexion, long blonde hair. Expressive facial features.
characters.wardrobe: Light blue striped button-down shirt with a white collar.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: चलो देखते हैं मेरी English pronunciation कैसी है। [Let's see how my English pronunciation is.]
Character A says: I vant vater. [I vant vater.]
Character A says: Supernova AI tutor ने बताया कि 'v' नहीं, 'w' sound चाहिए। [Supernova AI tutor said I need a 'w' sound, not 'v'.]
Character A says: Let me try again. [Let me try again.]
Character A says: I want water. [I want water.]
Character A says: अरे वाह! [Oh wow!]
Character A says: एकदम सही! [Absolutely correct!]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer by demonstrating a common pronunciation mistake in real-time.
- Introduces the AI tutor feature as a helpful, immediate feedback tool.
- Delivers a quick payoff showing instant improvement and building confidence.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
English pronunciation
I vant vater
Supernova AI Tutor:
Use 'w' sound, not 'v'
Let me try again.
I want water.
Excellent!
एकदम सही!

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: मुझे Supernova की सबसे अच्छी बात ये लगती है कि ये मेरी गलतियां तुरंत सुधारता है। [The best thing I like about Supernova is that it corrects my mistakes instantly.]
Character A says: इसमें रोज़ाना practice के लिए AI tutor है, जिससे आप बिना झिझक English बोलना सीख सकते हैं। [It has an AI tutor for daily practice, so you can learn to speak English without hesitation.]
Character A says: क्या आप भी confidently English बोलना चाहते हैं? [Do you also want to speak English confidently?]
Character A says: तो आज ही Supernova app download करें! [Then download the Supernova app today!]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Explains the core value proposition: instant correction and daily practice.
- Shifts the focus from 'sounding native' to 'speaking without hesitation' (confidence).
- Ends with a clear, encouraging call-to-action to download the app.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
तुरंत गलतियां सुधारें
Daily practice
with AI tutor
बिना झिझक
English बोलें
Ready to
speak confidently?
Download
Supernova
now!

scenes.scene_summary:
- Provides a clean visual wrap-up with the brand logo.
- Reinforces the main goal: speaking English confidently.
- Removes competitor pricing/free trial claims to align with Supernova's premium model.

Supernova
